name: formatters
description: Automatically format files the assistant writes, using the formatter the project itself is set up for (prettier, biome, pint, ruff, gofmt, rustfmt, ...). A formatter only runs when its binary or config is present in the project.

configSchema.label: Automatic formatting
configSchema.hint: Run the project's formatter right after write_file/edit_file succeeds. Formatting is on by default; switch this off to disable it entirely.

configSchema.label: Disabled formatters
configSchema.hint: Formatters that must never run, even when the project is set up for them.
